name: uniprot
description: UniProt — protein metadata, function, taxonomy, and sequences across UniProtKB, UniParc, and UniRef. Search, get entries, map IDs between databases, run SPARQL queries, stream bulk results. Vendored from the google-deepmind/science-skills bundle.
author: zorai

search.description: Search proteins in a UniProt dataset (UniProtKB / UniParc / UniRef) with automatic pagination.

get.description: Retrieve a single UniProt entry by accession (e.g. P04637).

map.description: Map IDs between databases (e.g. RefSeq -> UniProt, Ensembl -> UniProt). Polls the job until completion.

python.command: uv run scripts/uniprot_tools.py map "${UP_IDS:?set UP_IDS (comma-separated)}" --from_db "${UP_FROM_DB:?set UP_FROM_DB}" --to_db "${UP_TO_DB:?set UP_TO_DB}"

count.description: Count the number of hits for a query without retrieving the records.

sparql.description: Execute a SPARQL query against the UniProt endpoint.

python.command: uv run scripts/uniprot_tools.py sparql "${UP_SPARQL:?set UP_SPARQL (full SPARQL query string)}"

stream.description: Stream ALL results for a bulk query using the /stream endpoint (up to 10M entries, no limit). Use with care — large output.
